headline: BofA Retains a Neutral Rating on Builders FirstSource, Inc. (BLDR)
summary: Builders FirstSource, Inc. (NYSE:BLDR) is one of the 10 Best Housing Stocks to Buy in 2026. Builders FirstSource, Inc. (NYSE:BLDR) drew various target cuts in the month of April. On April 20, 2026, Bank of America trimmed its price target to $100 from $123. It retained a “Neutral rating” on the shares and stated that […]
